creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 223543
BETA4-RC1-oneline.log

Likewise here.

Tested amd64-{disk1,bootonly} on my ThinkPad X230 in Legacy BIOS mode with RC{1,2,3}, and anything prior works fine BETA{1,2,3,4}.  I've attached commit logs between BETA4 and RC1 to hopefully bisect the commit causing this new behaviour. For anyone interested, there are 46 commits between BETA4 to RC1, so thankfully nothing *too* extreme.

As for for the commit hashes in releng/13.0:
 
BETA1... 638e531019fd360ec43d2662c89d12ae632f168f
BETA2... 6461715f1ae19d028fcae45768cfa91f88b31f32
BETA3... 150b4388d3b5654d02071618dcdae48d6f11161f
BETA4... e32bc25362975db9896eeffc2933e078930a5383

RC1...  60e8939aa85b07f3271dcc01730727dda04c8bf6
RC2...  13c22f7495305f5b92874128b088ab47d9512c20
RC3...  8f731a397ad4dc7b17622c0e69ac045f4a7b9d5b
